ascend_skill.desc:
Makoto has 2 Theurgy: Cadenza and Ardhanari. At the start of battle, if Makoto's Theurgy Gauge is below 35, fill up to 35.
When receiving buff, healing, or shield skill effects from an ally (excluding effects that also target foes), gain 1 Moon Phase stack (up to 1 stack per turn). This effect lasts for 2 turns, and stacks up to 4 times.
With Moon Phase, increase pierce rate by 4%/8%/12% (effect changes at Lv. 1/50/70, respectively).
ascend_skill.name: Pathfinder

ascend_skill.desc:
Additional effects are added to the following skills.
Melody of Flames: This skill deals 1 more hit of Fire damage.
Nocturne of Battle: Increase party's pierce rate by 10% for 2 turns.
Scarlet Hades: When this skill is activated with 4 Moon Phase stacks, increase Makoto's critical rate by 16%.
ascend_skill.name: Result of Coincidence

ascend_skill.desc:
When Makoto has 4 Moon Phase stacks on his action, automatically activate Nocturne of Battle 1 time.
Cooldown time: 1 turn.
ascend_skill.name: Immovable Soul

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Scarlet Hades and Combat Tactics by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Under the Full Moon

ascend_skill.desc:
Additional effects are added to the following Theurgy.
Cadenza: Increase party's damage by 10% more for 2 turns.
Ardhanari: This skill deals 2 more hits of Fire damage.
ascend_skill.name: Thorny Path

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Melody of Flames and Nocturne of Battle by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Soul Flames

ascend_skill.desc:
When Makoto activates a Theurgy, the effects of the other Theurgy are activated at the same time.
Increase skill damage dealt by spending Full Moon stacks with Scarlet Hades by 35%.
The first time that Makoto takes fatal damage, he enters a special near-death state and survives with 1 HP, and will be KO'd at the end of the turn. If Makoto's HP is restored above 25%, this state is removed.
ascend_skill.name: Burn My Dread

assist_skill.desc: Increase 1 ally's Attack by 20% for 1 turn.
assist_skill.name: Assist

normal_skill.desc:
Deal Fire damage to 1 foe equal to 59.8%/66.0%/63.5%/69.6% of Attack (3 hits). Also, gain 2 Moon Phase stacks. This effect lasts for 2 turns, and stacks up to 4 times.
Also, when spending Moon Phase to use Scarlet Hades, increase skill multiplier by 32.5%/35.8%/34.5%/37.8% for 2 turns.
normal_skill.name: Melody of Flames

normal_skill.desc:
Increase party's critical damage by 23.4%/25.8%/24.9%/27.3%, and increase Makoto's Attack by 19.5%/21.5%/20.7%/22.7% for 2 turns.
Also, gain 2 Moon Phase stacks. This effect lasts for 2 turns, and stacks up to 4 times.
normal_skill.name: Nocturne of Battle

normal_skill.desc:
Can be activated with 2 or more Moon Phase stacks. Spend all Moon Phase stacks, and deal Fire damage to 1 foe equal to 91.5%/100.8%/97.1%/106.5% of Makoto's Attack (1 hit per stack spent). Afterwards, spend all Full Moon stacks, and deal Fire damage to 1 foe equal to 150.7%/166.2%/160.0%/175.5% of Makoto's Attack (1 hit per stack spent).
When this skill is activated with 4 Moon Phase stacks, increase Makoto's pierce rate by 11.7%/12.9%/12.4%/13.6%, and increase damage by 24.4%/26.9%/25.9%/28.4%.
normal_skill.name: Scarlet Hades

passive_skill.desc: After activating a Theurgy, increase party's Attack by 40.0% for 2 turns, and increase Attack of SEES members by 30.0% more.
passive_skill.name: On-Site Leader

passive_skill.desc: When receiving buff, healing, or shield skill effects from an ally (excluding effects that also target foes), increase critical damage by 7.2% for 2 turns. Stacks up to 3 times.
passive_skill.name: Entrusted Hope

theurgia_skill.desc:
Can be activated when Theurgy Gauge is at 100. Deal Fire damage to 1 foe equal to 147.5%/162.6%/156.5%/171.6% of Makoto's Attack (4 hits).
Also, gain 1 Full Moon stack. This effect lasts 2 turns, and stacks up to 4 times.
theurgia_skill.name: Ardhanari

theurgia_skill.desc: Can be activated when Theurgy Gauge is at 100. Increase party's Attack by 24.4%/26.9%/25.9%/28.4%, and increase damage by 19.5%/21.5%/20.7%/22.7% for 2 turns. Also, gain 1 Full Moon stack. This effect lasts 2 turns, and stacks up to 4 times.
theurgia_skill.name: Cadenza

theurgia_skill.desc:
Can be activated when Theurgy Gauge is at 100. Deal Fire damage to 1 foe equal to 147.5%/162.6%/156.5%/171.6% of Makoto's Attack (4 hits).
Also, gain 1 Full Moon stack. This effect lasts 2 turns, and stacks up to 4 times.
theurgia_skill.name: Ardhanari

theurgia_skill.desc: Can be activated when Theurgy Gauge is at 100. Increase party's Attack by 24.4%/26.9%/25.9%/28.4%, and increase damage by 19.5%/21.5%/20.7%/22.7% for 2 turns. Also, gain 1 Full Moon stack. This effect lasts 2 turns, and stacks up to 4 times.
theurgia_skill.name: Cadenza
